docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SILVIO MARTINS DE OLIVEIRA JR IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT SSB HOMES DBA BACKYARDZS COMPANY IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,178.66 FILED BY DE OLIVEIRA JR, SILVIO MARTINS AS TO DEFENDANT SSB HOMES DBA BACKYARDZ COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE OLIVEIRA JR, SILVIO MARTINS AS TO DEFENDANT SSB HOMES DBA BACKYARDZ COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-07-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SSB HOMES DBA BACKYARDZ COMPANY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) TMALES NUGAS FILED BY DEFENDANT SSB HOMES DBA BACKYARDZ COMPANY
